extraction.one_line_summary: BOASSON HAGEN attacked from the breakaway at 2km through a right-hand roundabout, using superior route choice and power to solo to victory.
tactical_patterns: BOASSON HAGEN navigated roundabout at 3km via right side without braking while rivals left-side required deceleration costing 50m.
Breakaway riders attempted repeated attacks to avoid sprint, but BOASSON HAGEN closed every gap solo without teammates.
ARNDT briefly led exiting roundabout at 3km but BOASSON HAGEN's acceleration off his wheel proved uncatchable.

rider_signals.BOASSON HAGEN Edvald: positive: Won by exploiting superior sprint speed that forced rivals into futile preemptive attacks he could easily cover alone
rider_signals.ARNDT Nikias: neutral: Had second-fastest sprint in break but couldn't hold BOASSON HAGEN's acceleration despite taking lead exiting roundabout
rider_signals.ALBASINI Michael: negative: Attacked multiple times with maximum effort at 2km but BOASSON HAGEN repeatedly closed gaps effortlessly
rider_signals.DE GENDT Thomas: neutral: Made aggressive attempt from chase group but strong riding insufficient against winner's gap
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: neutral: Finished safely 4 minutes down, maintains 23-second GC lead with 45-60 second time trial advantage expected tomorrow
